scenarios.description: Null NodeVisitor causes IllegalArgumentException at validation
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor = null; Node root = new Node();

scenarios.description: Null root Node causes IllegalArgumentException at validation
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor = new RecordingVisitor(); Node root = null;

scenarios.description: Single node with no children invokes head and tail once
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head called once with depth=0; visitor.tail called once with depth=0
pseudocode: CountingVisitor v; Node root with no children;
assert v.headCount==1; assert v.tailCount==1; assert v.maxDepth==0;

scenarios.description: Two-level tree descends into child and ascends back
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head called on root(depth=0) then child(depth=1); visitor.tail same order
pseudocode: RecordingVisitor v; Node root with one child;

scenarios.description: Visitor removes node in head causing skipped tail and correct ascent
scenarios.precondition: Use a stub visitor that calls node.remove() in head to simulate removal
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head called; removed node no tail; traversal returns after removal
pseudocode: NodeVisitor v removes node in head; Tree root with single node;

scenarios.description: Visitor replaces node in head causing sibling index traversal
scenarios.precondition: Use stub visitor that invokes node.replaceWith(newChild) in head
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head/tail called on replacement node; original parent retained depth0
pseudocode: NodeVisitor v replaces node with new node; root with one child;
assert v.headSequence contains new node at depth0; assert v.tailSequence contains new node;

scenarios.description: Deep tree of depth 3 exercises multiple descend/ascend loops
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor recorded correct head/tail for depths 0,1,2,3

scenarios.description: Node has no children but has next sibling exercises ascend loop
scenarios.precondition: root with two sibling children under a common parent
scenarios.expectedResult: head/tail called for first child then moves to next sibling
pseudocode: RecordingVisitor v; parent with two leaf children;

scenarios.description: Empty Elements list results in no traversal
Single Element in Elements invokes single-node traversal
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head and tail called once each on that Element
pseudocode: RecordingVisitor v; Elements with one element having no children;

scenarios.description: Multiple Elements stops after a STOP filter in one traversal
scenarios.expectedResult: second element not traversed after STOP
pseudocode: NodeFilter f that returns STOP at root of second element; Elements with two elements;
assert f.headCount(second)==1; assert first fully traversed; second partial;
